title: Handoff Document
description: A handoff document required when a task stops before completion, so the next agent (Codex or Claude Code) can continue without re-deriving context (see .agent/handoff/handoff-policy.md, .agent/handoff/handoff-template.md).

task.description: What task was being worked on.

scope.description: What was and was not in scope for this task.

startingCommit.description: Commit SHA when the task began.

latestCommit.description: Commit SHA at the time of handoff.

evidencePath.description: Path under quality/execution/ where this task's evidence lives.

openFailures.description: Known failing checks/tests left unresolved, never hidden (see .agent/master.md principle 12).

manualReview.description: Items that require human certification and must never be reported as automated pass (see .agent/quality/manual-review.md).

nextAction.description: The single next concrete step for the continuing agent.

prohibitedAssumptions.description: Explicit list of things the next agent must not assume or guess (see .agent/master.md §9).
